name: PIIMaskingGuardrailsAI
description: Detects and masks Personally Identifiable Information (PII) using Guardrails PII model. By default, PII values are masked during the request flow and restored in the response flow. If the 'redact' attribute is set to true, PII values will be permanently replaced with '*****'.

policyAttributes.name: name
policyAttributes.description: The name of the guardrail policy. This will be used for tracking purposes.

policyAttributes.name: piiEntities
policyAttributes.description: The PII entities to detect and mask.

policyAttributes.name: jsonPath
policyAttributes.description: Specifies the JSONPath expression to extract content from the payload for analysis. If omitted, the entire payload will be analyzed.

policyAttributes.name: redact
policyAttributes.description: If set to true, identified PII values will be permanently replaced with "*****" (irreversible).
